purpose: A multi-line text input with AI-assisted content generation, correction, or expansion. Distinguished from plain TextArea by the Joule accent border and inline AI suggestion capability.
whenToUse: Long-form text fields where AI can draft or improve content (emails, descriptions, notes)
Feedback or comment fields with tone-check assistance
Any TextArea where AI can meaningfully reduce user effort
As part of a form where AI generates sections on demand
whenNotToUse: For structured multi-line data (addresses, code) — use TextArea
For a Joule conversation — use AIPromptInput
For rich formatted content — use AIRichTextEditor
When AI adds no value (very short field, pure data entry)
doRules: Let user accept, reject, or edit AI suggestions inline
Preserve original text as user can undo AI changes
Show a visible AI badge so users know AI is active
dontRules: Do not overwrite user text without explicit action
Do not run AI on every keystroke — too aggressive
Do not hide the raw text — AI suggestions are additive, not replacements
Do not use in high-stakes contexts (legal, medical) without clear disclaimers

layoutGuidance.sizing: Min height 96px; grow to max 320px with scroll

contentGuidance.contentRules: Free-form text; AI can suggest completions or improvements

requirements: AI actions have aria-labels ('Rephrase with Joule')
Undo/redo keyboard shortcuts work as expected
AI badge is announced as 'AI-assisted' on focus
